response.original_title: How to Withdraw Crypto from Exodus Wallet?{Exodus Wallet Support}
response.overview: To withdraw+⭐1-(864).336.8850  cryptocurrency from Exodus, you can either send it to an external +⭐1-(864).336.8850  +⭐1-(864).336.8850  cryptocurrency wallet or use a connected exchange to cash it out for fiat money. Exodus is a non-custodial wallet, thus you must first move the cryptocurrency to a supported exchange in order to cash out to your bank. +⭐1-(864).336.8850  Choice 1: Transfer to an External Wallet or Withdraw+⭐1-(864).336.8850  Choose the +⭐1-(864).336.8850  Wallet or +⭐1-(864).336.8850  Asset tab while your Exodus desktop or app is open. To withdraw an asset+⭐1-(864).336.8850  , click on it and then click the Send button.
response.title: How to Withdraw Crypto from Exodus Wallet?{Exodus Wallet Support}
